title: Where I've delivered results
intro: From creative agencies to Fortune 500 to startups — I've led complex programs in fast-moving environments where delivery matters.

jobs.description: Full-service strategy & technology consultancy delivering digital transformation across Data & AI, Experience, and Product Development. Led AI/ML implementations including decision engines and dynamic dashboards. Championed 4 direct reports to successful promotions. Founded company's first Agile Community of Practice.

jobs.role: Sr. Manager, Agile Delivery / Sr. Technical Program Manager · San Francisco, CA
jobs.description: Data science-driven auto insurance startup (State Farm-sponsored). Led enterprise agile transformation for 150+ individuals — transitioned from siloed teams to cross-functional squads, reducing cycle time 30% and improving predictability 20%. Established monthly portfolio reviews and pulse surveys, improving employee experience 25%.

jobs.role: Agile Coach / Program Manager · San Francisco, CA
jobs.description: Supported 30+ teams delivering global inventory management and omni-channel solutions. Led InStock iPad app (~$60M in increased global revenue), Buy Online/Pick Up In Store features, and Promotion Generation Engine. Founded and facilitated Gap's Agile Community of Practice, growing from 5 to 20 participants.

jobs.role: Sr. Agile Project Manager / Scrum Master · San Francisco, CA
jobs.description: Championed agile processes for Audi of America's $10MM/year continuous development pipeline (30+ global engineers). Product Manager for Audi dealership iPad apps ($6MM/yr, 97% adoption). Led site redesign for audiusa.com including Car Configurator. Additional clients: Activision, Salesforce, Safeway.

jobs.role: Digital Project Manager / Scrum Master · Dallas, TX
jobs.description: Led full redesign of Marines.com ($4M budget, launched Jan 2012) and implementation of new CMS platform ($600K). Managed cross-functional teams of 3–30 individuals across two geographical offices using agile methodologies. Consolidated officer.marines.com into redesigned marines.com platform.
